name: Allstate Insurance Co.
lede: Allstate runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Pune, covering it, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Allstate office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Allstate Insurance Co. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Allstate runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Pune), covering it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Allstate's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Pune, spanning it. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 48 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Allstate operate in India?
faq.a: Allstate operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Allstate have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Allstate's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Allstate run in India?
faq.a: Allstate runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Allstate's India GCCs?
faq.a: Allstate's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Allstate's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 48 leaders at Allstate's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
